title: Mechanism (GSM base archetype)
description: Base ascription schema for Mechanism ElementDefinitions. Defines the logical causal unit's behavioral attributes. Tenant-defined archetypes extending Mechanism MUST reference this schema via allOf.

function.description: Capability label describing what the Mechanism does (e.g., 'validation', 'routing', 'transformation').

operation.description: Executable logic in the declared operationLanguage. Encodes what the Mechanism does — behavioral definition.

operationLanguage.description: Expression language for the operation field. Currently only STARLARK (Python-like, for behavioral logic).
